125 BUENA VISTA CIRCLE, SOUTH HILL, VA 23970

4 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 4/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 4/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 5/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 5/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 4/5

Staffing & Workforce

Direct-care staffing is the strongest operational driver of quality in nursing homes. Values are hours per resident per day, derived from payroll-based journal (PBJ) submissions. "Case-mix" adjusts for resident acuity; "Adjusted" is the CMS rating-input value.

Role Reported Case-mix expected Adjusted Federal floor
Total nurse
All nursing staff combined: RN + LPN + Aide
 2.92 3.62 3.12 ≥ 3.48 Below floor
Registered Nurse (RN)
Licensed RN hours. Strongest driver of clinical outcomes.
 0.45 0.63 0.48 ≥ 0.55 Below floor
Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN)
LPN/LVN hours. Often handles medication administration.
 0.78 0.80 0.83 —
Nurse aide
CNA hours. Bulk of direct resident care — bathing, feeding, mobility.
 1.70 2.18 1.81 —
Licensed (RN + LPN)
Combined licensed nurse coverage.
 1.22 — — —
Physical therapist
Rehabilitation therapist hours — important for post-acute / rehab admissions.
 0.14 — — —

Federal minimums (phasing in under the CMS 2024 minimum staffing rule) shown for reference. RN: 0.55 hrs/resident/day. Total nurse: 3.48 hrs/resident/day.

Weekend staffing

Total nurse (weekend)
2.31
hrs / resident / day
RN (weekend)
0.12
hrs / resident / day
Total nurse (adjusted, weekend)
2.46
hrs / resident / day

Weekend under-staffing is a common quality-of-care concern — adverse events are more frequent when licensed coverage drops.

Staff turnover

Total nursing staff turnover
59.8%
annual
RN turnover
61.1%
annual
Administrators departed
1
last 12 months

Resident acuity

Nursing Case-Mix Index
1.28
higher acuity than avg
Case-Mix Index Ratio
0.93
facility / state ratio

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2023-05-03 6 6 0 28 1 28
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2021-06-10 5 5 0 28 1 28
Total weighted health score
28.0
lower is better

Deficiencies (27)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

2 A/B/C No actual harm — minor
22 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
3 G/H/I Actual harm
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0607 Develop and implement policies and procedures to prevent abuse, neglect, and theft. D 2023-05-03 2023-06-16
0657 Develop the complete care plan within 7 days of the comprehensive assessment; and prepared, reviewed, and revised by a team of health professionals. D 2023-05-03 2023-06-16
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. E 2023-05-03 2023-06-16
0686 Provide appropriate pressure ulcer care and prevent new ulcers from developing. D 2023-05-03 2023-06-16
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. D 2023-05-03 2023-06-16
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. D 2023-05-03 2023-06-16
0655 Create and put into place a plan for meeting the resident's most immediate needs within 48 hours of being admitted D 2021-06-10 2021-07-22
0725 Provide enough nursing staff every day to meet the needs of every resident; and have a licensed nurse in charge on each shift. E 2021-06-10 2021-07-22
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. E 2021-06-10 2021-07-22
0814 Dispose of garbage and refuse properly. D 2021-06-10 2021-07-22
0842 Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. D 2021-06-10 2021-07-22
0641 Ensure each resident receives an accurate assessment. D 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0656 Develop and implement a complete care plan that meets all the resident's needs, with timetables and actions that can be measured. D 2019-05-30 2019-07-31
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. E 2019-05-30 2019-07-31
0686 Provide appropriate pressure ulcer care and prevent new ulcers from developing. G 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0688 Provide appropriate care for a resident to maintain and/or improve range of motion (ROM), limited ROM and/or mobility, unless a decline is for a medical reason. G 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0690 Provide appropriate care for residents who are continent or incontinent of bowel/bladder, appropriate catheter care, and appropriate care to prevent urinary tract infections. E 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0691 Provide appropriate colostomy, urostomy, or ileostomy care/services for a resident who requires such services. E 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0692 Provide enough food/fluids to maintain a resident's health. G 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. D 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0725 Provide enough nursing staff every day to meet the needs of every resident; and have a licensed nurse in charge on each shift. E 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0732 Post nurse staffing information every day. C 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0744 Provide the appropriate treatment and services to a resident who displays or is diagnosed with dementia. D 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0756 Ensure a licensed pharmacist perform a monthly drug regimen review, including the medical chart, following irregularity reporting guidelines in developed policies and procedures. D 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0842 Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. D 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. C 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
0881 Implement a program that monitors antibiotic use. F 2019-05-30 2019-07-12
